untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options strategy (bear put spread with specific strike relationships and debit/credit dynamics). The backtest engine indicators provided are technical analysis indicators for spot/futures price action only. Options-specific parameters like strike prices, strike relationships, debit/credit spread mechanics, and put/call selection cannot be expressed using price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, or volume indicators. Options strategies require dedicated options chain data and strike-level logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires options-specific logic: (1) sell put at lower strike, (2) buy put at higher strike, (3) verify debit spread mechanics. These are structural options positions that cannot be translated into technical indicator conditions on price bars.
